items.title: Diagnose ollama-secondary (:11435)
items.goal: Check if Ollama process is running on :11435, restart if needed, verify health
items.acceptance: ollama-secondary responds to health check on :11435
items.verify_cmd: curl -sf http://127.0.0.1:11435/api/tags > /dev/null && echo PASS || echo FAIL

items.title: Diagnose vps-fallback (100.64.0.2:11434)
items.goal: Check VPS Ollama via Headscale, restart if needed or mark as intentional-offline
items.acceptance: VPS Ollama responds OR documented as intentional-offline in config
items.verify_cmd: ssh vps 'ss -tlnp | grep 11434' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

items.title: Add rlm-swarm consumer to batkave.toml
items.goal: Add rate limit config for rlm-swarm consumer: 120 req/min, burst 40
items.acceptance: rlm-swarm consumer appears in rate_limits section with correct values
items.verify_cmd: grep -A2 'rlm-swarm' config/batkave.toml | grep -q '120' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

items.title: Add ceo-agent consumer to batkave.toml
items.goal: Add rate limit config for ceo-agent consumer: 30 req/min, burst 10
items.acceptance: ceo-agent consumer appears in rate_limits section with correct values
items.verify_cmd: grep -A2 'ceo-agent' config/batkave.toml | grep -q '30' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

items.title: Add RAG config for ceo-agent consumer
items.goal: Add RAG context injection: collection=knowledge_graph, top_k=5, min_score=0.7
items.acceptance: ceo-agent RAG section in config with correct collection/top_k/min_score
items.verify_cmd: grep -A4 'ceo-agent' config/batkave.toml | grep -q 'knowledge_graph' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

items.title: Verify rlm-swarm RAG config alignment
items.goal: Check if ralph-swarm RAG config exists and either rename to rlm-swarm or add alias
items.acceptance: rlm-swarm has RAG config (new or aliased from ralph-swarm)
items.verify_cmd: python3 -c "import tomllib; c=tomllib.load(open('config/batkave.toml','rb')); print('PASS')"

items.title: Verify 7/7 backends healthy
items.goal: After backend fixes, confirm hivemind admin shows all backends healthy
items.acceptance: Zero unhealthy backends in health endpoint
items.verify_cmd: curl -s http://127.0.0.1:8401/health | jq '.backends | map(select(.healthy == false)) | length' | grep -q '^0$' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

items.title: Add hivemind routing to agent-launch.sh
items.goal: When RLM_MODEL_OVERRIDE=local|hivemind, set OPENAI_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8400/v1 with X-HiveMind-Consumer: rlm-swarm header
items.acceptance: agent-launch.sh routes through :8400 when RLM_MODEL_OVERRIDE=hivemind
items.verify_cmd: grep -c 'HIVEMIND\|8400' ralph/rlm-engine/launchers/agent-launch.sh | grep -q '[1-9]' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

items.title: Wire Toolmem research through hivemind
items.goal: Change recall queries in agent-launch.sh to use :8400 when available, fallback to direct
items.acceptance: Toolmem queries route through hivemind with fallback to direct
items.verify_cmd: grep -c 'HIVEMIND_URL\|8400' ralph/rlm-engine/launchers/agent-launch.sh | grep -q '[2-9]' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

items.title: Add HIVEMIND_URL to gen-launchers.sh template
items.goal: Inject HIVEMIND_URL env var into generated launchers so they inherit routing
items.acceptance: Generated launchers include HIVEMIND_URL export
items.verify_cmd: grep -c 'HIVEMIND_URL' ralph/rlm-engine/launchers/gen-launchers.sh | grep -q '[1-9]' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

items.title: Add HIVEMIND_URL to mega-chief.sh
items.goal: Export HIVEMIND_URL in mega-chief orchestrator environment
items.acceptance: mega-chief.sh exports HIVEMIND_URL for child agents
items.verify_cmd: grep -c 'HIVEMIND_URL' ralph/rlm-engine/launchers/mega-chief.sh | grep -q '[1-9]' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

items.title: Add hivemind health check to rlm-preflight.sh
items.goal: Health-check hivemind (:8400) as part of preflight, warn if down
items.acceptance: rlm-preflight.sh checks :8400 health and warns if unreachable
items.verify_cmd: grep -c '8400\|hivemind' ralph/rlm-engine/launchers/rlm-preflight.sh | grep -q '[1-9]' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

items.title: Modify registerAdapters() for hivemind routing
items.goal: Change Ollama adapter URL from :11434 to :8400, add X-HiveMind-Consumer: ceo-agent header
items.acceptance: registerAdapters() uses :8400 for local inference with consumer header
items.verify_cmd: grep -c '8400\|HiveMind' ~/project-incubator/ceo-agent/cmd/ceo-agent/main.go | grep -q '[1-9]' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

items.title: Update OLLAMA_BASE_URL default in CEO-Agent
items.goal: Change default OLLAMA_BASE_URL to http://localhost:8400/v1 in config/env
items.acceptance: Default URL points to hivemind :8400
items.verify_cmd: grep -c '8400' ~/project-incubator/ceo-agent/cmd/ceo-agent/main.go | grep -q '[1-9]' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

items.title: Remove redundant PII call from CEO-Agent
items.goal: Remove CEO-Agent's own PII scanning since hivemind already does it inline
items.acceptance: CEO-Agent no longer double-scans via PII Shield; hivemind handles PII
items.verify_cmd: grep -c 'PIIFilter\|pii_filter\|anonymize' ~/project-incubator/ceo-agent/cmd/ceo-agent/main.go | grep -q '^0$' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

items.title: Keep cloud fallbacks unchanged
items.goal: Verify Anthropic and OpenRouter adapters are untouched — cloud calls remain direct
items.acceptance: Cloud adapter registrations unchanged from baseline
items.verify_cmd: grep -c 'NewAnthropicAdapter\|NewOpenRouterAdapter' ~/project-incubator/ceo-agent/cmd/ceo-agent/main.go | grep -q '^2$' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

items.title: Commit all hivemind changes
items.goal: Stage and commit config/batkave.toml, internal/config/config.go, internal/gateway/proxy.go + new changes
items.acceptance: Clean git status for hivemind tracked files
items.verify_cmd: cd ~/ralph/hivemind && git diff --name-only | wc -l | grep -q '^0$' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

items.title: Rebuild hivemind-gw binary
items.goal: Build the gateway binary with latest config struct changes
items.acceptance: go build exits 0, binary updated
items.verify_cmd: cd ~/ralph/hivemind && go build -o hivemind-gw ./cmd/hivemind-gw/ && echo PASS || echo FAIL

items.title: Restart gateway and verify ports
items.goal: Run restart.sh, verify :8400/:8401/:8402 all listening
items.acceptance: All 3 ports respond to health/metrics checks
items.verify_cmd: curl -sf http://127.0.0.1:8400/v1/models > /dev/null && curl -sf http://127.0.0.1:8401/health > /dev/null && curl -sf http://127.0.0.1:8402/metrics > /dev/null && echo PASS || echo FAIL

items.title: Validate OpenClaude routing
items.goal: Send test prompt through OpenClaude, verify X-HiveMind-Backend header
items.acceptance: OpenClaude request appears in hivemind metrics with openclaude consumer label
items.verify_cmd: curl -s http://127.0.0.1:8402/metrics | grep -q 'consumer="openclaude"' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

items.title: Validate departmental agent routing
items.goal: Run test legal/compliance agent, verify metrics show consumer label
items.acceptance: Departmental agent request appears in hivemind metrics
items.verify_cmd: curl -s http://127.0.0.1:8402/metrics | grep -q 'hivemind_requests_total' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

items.title: Validate RLM engine routing
items.goal: Run RLM_MODEL_OVERRIDE=hivemind test agent, verify rlm-swarm consumer in metrics
items.acceptance: rlm-swarm consumer label appears in Prometheus metrics
items.verify_cmd: curl -s http://127.0.0.1:8402/metrics | grep -q 'consumer="rlm-swarm"' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

items.title: Validate CEO-Agent routing
items.goal: Start CEO-Agent, trigger decision, verify ceo-agent consumer in metrics
items.acceptance: ceo-agent consumer label appears in Prometheus metrics
items.verify_cmd: curl -s http://127.0.0.1:8402/metrics | grep -q 'consumer="ceo-agent"' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

items.title: Validate headroom compression increase
items.goal: Verify compress_count > 5 at headroom sidecar
items.acceptance: Headroom health shows compress_count above baseline
items.verify_cmd: curl -s http://127.0.0.1:9103/health | jq '.compress_count > 5' | grep -q 'true' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

items.title: Run all audits
items.goal: Execute preflight, security, performance, data integrity, dependency, rollback, and siteops audits per audit-specs/
items.acceptance: All audit reports generated in logs/audit-specs/
items.verify_cmd: ls logs/audit-specs/*.md 2>/dev/null | wc -l | grep -q '[6-9]\|1[0-9]' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

items.title: Collect confidence gates
items.goal: Gather confidence scores from dev, architect, siteops, security, product, QA evaluator agents
items.acceptance: All 6 roles report confidence >= 0.95
items.verify_cmd: python3 -c "import json; g=json.load(open('logs/confidence-gates.json')); assert all(v>=0.95 for v in g.values()), f'Low: {g}'; print('PASS')"

items.title: Final SHIP/NO-SHIP decision
items.goal: Independent evaluator reviews all evidence and renders final verdict
items.acceptance: final-ship-decision.md contains VERDICT: SHIP with evidence summary
items.verify_cmd: grep -q 'VERDICT: SHIP' logs/final-ship-decision.md && echo PASS || echo FAIL
